items.title: A Look at Honeywell International's Valuation Following Solstice Advanced Materials Spin-Off Announcement
items.description: Honeywell International (HON) just made waves with its announcement of a planned spin-off for its Solstice Advanced Materials business, filing a Form 10 Registration Statement with the SEC to kick off the process. The spin-off, which aims to list Solstice independently on the Nasdaq and be tax-free for Honeywell shareholders in the U.S., represents a strategic shift that could reshape the company’s future direction. For investors, this kind of structural move often sparks immediate questions:...
